1-866-419-SIGN or 320-965-9300 or email [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#eb988e999d82888eab898a85858e9998c5888486d4989e89818e889fd6ad879282858cced9dba98a85858e99ced9dbaf82989b878a9298)** Banners.com has three types of bowed flags - the Rectangle Flag, the Razor Flag, and the Tear Drop Flag. These flags work great for grand opening, sales, open houses, or just letting people know that you are open! These flags can be used indoors or outdoors to present messages and corporate identities. Each of the flags come in a variety of different sizes. You can choose from a spike base, a water ballast and scissor foot, or a heavy duty cross foot base. Rectangle Flag Razor Flag Tear Drop Flag [![Rectangle Flags](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/3fa91cd8-10dc-4093-a833-5cfccc7baaa4.jpg)](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/rectangle-flags) [![Razor Flags](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/b258d9d9-14f5-487a-a124-0867258445dd.jpg)](
